features: AFFORDABLE BATHROOM SOLUTION – Each bottle delivers 375 powerful sprays – that’s over 1,110 odour-busting spritzes per pack to keep your loo smelling lovely! A great toilet bowl spray freshener for home, office & vacation use

DESIGNED TO FRESHEN YOUR TOILET – Pooper Swooper toilet spray gets rid of the nasty smell in your toilet. This poo spray for toilet covers and masks the foul odour after a poop session and stops the bad smell from dominating in the air.

FRUITY FLUSH SCENT – The fresh, clean, and even sweet notes of fruity flush toilet spray freshener & toilet air freshener leaves a kind of fragrance that leaves a touch of sparkling joy and cleanness.
ODOUR-NEUTRALISING FORMULA – This toilet air refresher contains a powerful blend of oils that eliminates odours on contact. It’s kind to the nose and leaves no residue on the toilet bowl.

HANDY & EASY TO USE – Pooper Swooper Toilet spray poo is easy to use, spray 2-3 times in the room before leaving or spray around the toilet bowl. Great for travel just bring it with you in your bag to mask toilet odours anywhere you go.
description: Product Description Previous page Next page Shop our Toilet Cleaning Products 3pk Pooper Spray Fruity Add To Basket 6pk Pooper Spray Fruity Add To Basket 3pk Pooper Spray Citrus Add To Basket 6pk Pooper Spray Citrus Add To Basket Toilet Cistern Blocks Add To Basket 3pk Toilet Fresheners Add To Basket 6pk Toilet Fresheners Add To Basket Customer Reviews 4.2 out of 5 stars 772 4.2 out of 5 stars 417 4.1 out of 5 stars 927 4.2 out of 5 stars 417 3.4 out of 5 stars 433 3.4 out of 5 stars 2,059 3.4 out of 5 stars 2,059 Price £5.99 £ 5 . 99 £9.99 £ 9 . 99 £5.99 £ 5 . 99 £9.99 £ 9 . 99 £9.99 £ 9 . 99 £9.99 £ 9 . 99 £12.99 £ 12 . 99 Quantity 3pk 6pk 3pk 6pk 24pk 3pk 6pk Scent Fruity Flush Fruity Flush Citrus Splash Citrus Splash Ocean Ocean Blue Ocean Blue Deep Clean, Fresh Feel ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ Freshness Unleashed ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ Flush Away the Dirt ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ How does the Pooper Swooper toilet spray freshen the toilet? Pooper Swooper eliminates foul odours, leaving behind a fresh fruity flush scent that masks unpleasant smells. What makes the fruity flush scent special? Our toilet spray features fresh, clean, and sweet notes, leaving a sparkling touch of joy and cleanliness after every use. Is Pooper Swooper just for the bathroom? No, Pooper Swooper can be used as an all purpose odour eliminator, in the home, car or office! How convenient is Pooper Swooper to use? Extremely easy! Simply spray 2-3 times in the room or around the toilet bowl to eliminate odours. Perfect for travel too! What value does the Pooper Swooper pack offer? You will receive 3x 60ml bottles of Fruity Pooper Swooper, for great value and effective odour elimination at home, work, or on-the-go.
